Tests multiplication of `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` by 1 in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of JavaScript's `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` when multiplied by `1`. The assertion checks that the result of this multiplication is still `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`, which confirms the expected behavior of the multiplication operation involving negative infinity in JavaScript. This test is narrow in scope, focusing specifically on the mathematical properties of `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`.
